hero.descripcion: Full-Stack Developer from Bucaramanga, Colombia. I have experience in ASP.NET, NestJS, Perl, and Angular. I am familiar with using Docker and AWS for application deployment. I am focused on solving technical problems logically and independently, always prioritizing the quality of the final result.

aboutme.introduccion: Full-Stack Developer focused on creating efficient, scalable, and high-quality systems. I combine my ongoing academic training with practical experience in software architecture, testing methodologies, and cloud solutions. I am known for my self-management skills, critical thinking to solve technical problems, and a consistent track record of delivering solid results. With a strong command of English that supports my excellent performance in the field, I invite you to explore my full profile in the following section.

roles.descripcion: Software developer with a broad stack, I stand out for my analytical skills, autonomy, and focus on solid technical results.
Technician with adaptive ability, knowledge in LAN networks, hardware, server knowledge and cloud hosting.
Freelance software developer with strong problem-solving skills. I have developed custom software and Android apps.
